title: Basic Weapons
description: Adds vanilla+ weaponry - no extra fluff or sparkles
body:
This description is up to date with the most recent version of Minecraft that the mod supports. Features may be modified or missing in earlier versions.

![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/26.1-active_development-seagreen) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/1.21.11-bugfixes-dodgerblue) ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/1.21.1-bugfixes-dodgerblue)

![Basic Weapons Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d502599025f03b1d821284de4ddbbf8d230d0c2.webp) [![Explore All Mods Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6d32f79d6730fcfa7eb1c59b0c71783f3429990.png)](https://khazoda.com)[![Help Translate Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26ca581bda9315561258983f084c33103c7610bf.png)](https://poeditor.com/join/project/vW0G3i42PX)[![Material Packs Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c38b8f135ec8ecfd389d9ddb2b46ca6acd59a84.png)](https://www.khazoda.com/basicweapons/materialpacks)[![Full Mod Description Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bdc40049d20ff26aa3f65f03d2e758a352d1bce.png)](https://www.khazoda.com/basicweapons)
[![GitHub Repository Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8f646edd7d2c78e4e4ac342bd23e39bffec110a.png)](https://github.com/khazoda-mods/basicweapons)[![GitHub Repository Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca03d06a7f0a55598d86ab0aa51bddcdac798443.png)](https://github.com/khazoda/basicweapons-legacy)
# About **Basic Weapons expands on Minecraft's melee offerings with six vanilla-styled weapon types for every vanilla tool material.** - Adds daggers, clubs, hammers, pikes, quarterstaves and glaives - Balances each weapon around damage, speed, reach, crafting cost and effects - Install bespoke [material packs](https://www.khazoda.com/basicweapons/materialpacks/help) to add weapons from other mods materials - Includes built-in [Bronze](https://modrinth.com/mod/bronze) mod compatibility ----------------------------------------------------------------- **⚠️ Minecraft Bugs That Affect This Mod** - ❌ **Problem**: Minecraft 1.21.10 and below has a bug that causes item models in Vanilla Minecraft to have visible gaps. - 🟢 **Solution**: - 1.21.10 and earlier: I strongly recommend using the **[Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)** mod - 1.21.11+: Mojang has fixed this bug in 1.21.11 ([MC-73186](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-73186)) - ❌ **Problem**: Minecraft 1.21+ has a bug ([MC-271840](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-271840)) that stops damage increase enchantments (like Sharpness and Might) from showing the damage increase in a weapon's tooltip. - 🟢 **Solution**: - 1.21 - 1.21.4: Install [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips) - 1.21.10+: Make sure you're using Basic Weapons [2.2.2+1.21.10](https://modrinth.com/mod/basicweapons/version/QxrGeMMG) or later, which includes a fix for any weapon that accepts Sharpness or Might. ----------------------------------------------------------------- Basic Weapons adds **six** new tiered melee weapon types to complement the existing sword, axe and spear in Minecraft. Each weapon is balanced around damage, attack speed, crafting costs, attack reach and special effects. _If you have Better Combat installed, the weapons are also balanced around number of enemies hit and combos._ ![Assorted Basic Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7436b268b5c88d9db1a927204bc166452130e01.png) Weapons should feel _unique, powerful, easy to use_ and _fair._ I made Basic Weapons because I was looking around for weapon mods that would fit seamlessly into vanilla gameplay, and didn't quite find what I was looking for. I hope that in creating Basic Weapons, I've made that search a little easier for those of you who've had a similar experience. This high level overview should give you an idea of what each weapon is good and bad at: | Weapon | Damage | Speed | Baseline Effect | Reach | | ------------- | ------ | --------- | -------------------- | --------- | | Vanilla Sword | Medium | Medium | Sweeping | Medium | | Vanilla Axe | High | Slow | Shield Break | Medium | | Dagger | Low | Fast | | Medium | | Club | High | Slow | Slow target | Medium | | Hammer | High | Very Slow | Knock target upwards | Medium | | Pike | Medium | Medium | | Very High | | Quarterstaff | Low | Medium | Sweeping | High | | Glaive | High | Very Slow | Sweeping | High | # Material Pack System Do you want compatibility with another mod's material? Check the [Public Material Pack List](https://www.khazoda.com/basicweapons/materialpacks/list) to see if a material pack for that mod has been created. If it doesn't exist? No problem! You can create materialpacks yourself with the [Material Pack Creator](https://www.khazoda.com/basicweapons/materialpacks) web application, and submit them to the public list if you wish. Material Packs are loaded at the start of the game from the **basicweapons_materialpacks** folder in your Minecraft root directory. Make sure you add packs before loading the game up, if you add them after, they won't load. **Treat them as if they are mod files rather than resource or datapacks.** # Mod Integrations Basic Weapons can be enhanced by installing other mods alongside it. The following are mods that Basic Weapons has built-in support for. ## Bronze My [Bronze](https://modrinth.com/mod/bronze) mod adds bronze & tin basic weapons automatically when both mods are installed together. No material pack required. ![Bronze Basic Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d44bac5d553666b2d6cf517f9f6acda108f3165e.png) ## Better Combat With [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) installed, quarterstaves receive exciting new attack combos, daggers and clubs can be paired with other weapons for dual-wielding mayhem, and the hammer even features a fully custom attack animation. ## Community Mods - [Bonded](https://modrinth.com/mod/bonded) with their [compatibility module](https://modrinth.com/mod/bonded-basic-weapons-compat) - [Kev's Equipment Sets](https://modrinth.com/mod/kevs-equipment-sets) **If you have a project that includes Basic Weapons let me know! I love seeing what people create, and can add your project to this list if you wish.** # Frequently Asked Questions **What does the "Might" enchantment do?** Might functions exactly the same as vanilla Sharpness. It increases the damage of your weapon by a flat amount based on the enchantment level. I felt that blunt weapons having Sharpness didn't make much sense, hence Might. **Is there a (fabric/forge/neoforge/risugami's modloader) version?** Basic Weapons exists on both Fabric and NeoForge. If you're running Quilt, use the Fabric jar. **Can you backport the mod to Minecraft 1.X.X?** Basic Weapons will not be backported. The mod will however support new [major versions](https://www.khazoda.com/versions) of Minecraft. **I found a bug / my game crashed** If you find any problems with Basic Weapons, please feel encouraged to create an issue on the GitHub repository issue tracker. Bug reports are incredibly useful and help this mod reach its full potential.
